BondBloxx Private Credit CLO ETF (PCMM) Named “Newcomer Fixed Income ETF of the Year” at 2026 With Intelligence Mutual Fund & ETF Awards

overview.description: The BondBloxx Private Credit CLO ETF (PCMM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is an actively managed fund that seeks capital preservation and current income. The fund invests in a pool of loans to private, middle market companies PCMM was launched on Dec 2, 2024 and is issued by BondBloxx.

data.title: Private-credit ETFs are here. Why your retirement account may be their next target.
data.text: Private-credit ETFs aren't in 401(k)s yet — but they are Wall Street's latest effort to bring private assets to the masses and, eventually, into retirement plans.

data.title: BondBloxx Is Launching the First ETF Providing Direct Exposure to Private Credit
data.text: LARKSPUR, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--BondBloxx to launch PCMM ETF on 12/3, democratizing access to middle market loans and offering direct exposure to private credit.
